modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Copier is out of toner and needs replacement.

full_description_text: The user called in saying their Sharp BC-70C31 copier is out of toner. They were trying to print some important documents but it just stopped working. They mentioned something about needing to replace the cartridge, but they weren't sure how to do it.
short_description: Copier is out of toner and needs replacement.
description: The user called in saying their Sharp BC-70C31 copier is out of toner. They were trying to print some important documents but it just stopped working. They mentioned something about needing to replace the cartridge, but they weren't sure how to do it.
